original_snippet_context: Discussing the potential benefits and drawbacks of different conversion rates for the mil-réis.
relevant_quote: A Caixa de Conversão, estabelecida com a taxa de 15d, facilitaria a exportação do café, principal producto nacional...
justification: This quote suggests that the Caixa, with a 15d rate, would benefit coffee exports.  A focus on exports and specific product sectors is characteristic of the expansionist perspective.
